title: CanvAi
text:
CanvAi is shutting down.
New projects and image generations are no longer available. You can still view and download your previous generations. If you've purchased credits and would like a refund, please contact us at
hello@canvai.co
.
CanvAi is shutting down
Thank you for being part of CanvAi. The service is no longer accepting new projects or generations. If you have an existing account, you can still access and download your previous generations.
If you've purchased credits and would like a refund, please contact us at
hello@canvai.co
.
View My Projects
